donations.title: Support the App
donations.subtitle:
Sama is free and ad-free.
If it helps your practice, consider supporting its development.

about.title: About
about.description: Sama (Simple Meditation Timer) is an ad-free meditation timer with a local journal. Export and import your sessions in JSON, XLSX, or TXT format. No tracking. No internet required.
about.author: Author
about.openSource: Free app. No ads. No tracking.

pp.s1body: Sama does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data or usage information of any kind.
pp.s2title: Your data stays on your device
pp.s2body: All information you create in the app — sessions, journal entries, presets, and settings — is stored exclusively on your device using local storage. This data never leaves your device and is never shared with anyone.
pp.s3body: The app contains no analytics tools, advertising SDKs, crash reporters, or any third-party tracking code. We have no way of knowing how you use the app, and we do not want to.
pp.s4body: Sama works entirely offline. It makes no network requests of any kind. An internet connection is never needed to use any feature of the app.
pp.s5body: The app does not require or offer user accounts, logins, or registration of any kind.
